name: IPhone 12 128GB/64GB
description: iPhone 12. Super bright 6.1 inch Super Retina XDR screen. Ceramic Shield with four times better drop resistance. Stunning low-light photography with Night mode on all cameras. Capable of recording, editing and playing cinema-class videos with Dolby Vision. Reliable A14 Bionic chip. And a new MagSafe accessory for easy pairing and faster wireless charging. It's time to have fun.

features.Key Features: 6.1 inch Super Retina XDR display | Ceramic Shield, tougher than any smartphone glass | A14 Bionic chip, the fastest chip ever in a smartphone | Advanced dual camera system with Ultra Wide and Wide 12 MP cameras; Night mode, Deep Fusion, | Smart HDR 3, HDR 4K Dolby Vision recording | 12 MP TrueDepth front camera with Night mode, 4K Dolby Vision HDR recording | Industry-leading IP68 water resistance level | Supports MagSafe accessories for easy pairing and faster wireless charging | iOS 14 with redesigned widgets on the Home Screen, an all-new App Library, App Clips, and more
features.What’s In The Box: iPhone dengan iOS 14. | Kabel USB-C ke Lightning. | Buku Manual dan dokumentasi lain
